reviews.review_msg: She's boring. Just read her notes in the lectures. Not very helpful.

I don't normally rate profs but I need to here to save others a lot of trouble. Avoid like the plague! Horrible accent and quiet voice. All she does is bring printouts that she then re-writes on the overhead for some reason instead of just posting them online :S Assumes difficult concepts are easy. Oh yeah..no break in a 3 hour lecture either.
i just wanna say it is so boring!!! so much notes and she just read the notes.  maybe more effecient that you read the textbook and learning it by yourself.
the worst of the worst. class is extremely boring with a heavy accent. Not helpful in person either.
Heavy accent. Teaches you nothing(only read off the notes)
She is so yooung and very nice, very easy exam ,and very helpful. The best instructor in SFU.

This course weights 5 credits, and it covers so many materials. However, if u preview notes,attend class , and do all assignments by yourself. You will be fine. Her notes are well organized, and the exam is not hard. She is always really to help, if u have any problem.
Great Instructor, lovely and willing to help, going to class is mandatory and exam is fair
The class material is well-organized. She is very helpful. The midterm is fair.
She is so nice. The miderterm is not hard and fair. if you attend her class regularly, you will get a good mark.

If she didn't give pop quiz during lecture, there would be no students going to her lecture.                     So regret taking her lecutre, where she just read her notes without proper explanation.                   I wanna get my money back!!!!!!!!!!!!!
the worse teacher I ever have so far. She teaches u nothing.
Great Instructor, must attend lectures to attain high grades
